titles: "안전한 채권이라며…" TLT -31% 맞은 박대리, 2026년엔 뭘 사야 했나 | 채권 ETF 완전 해부
금리 인하 전에 TLT 몰빵하면 큰일나는 이유 — SHY·IEF·TLT 듀레이션 5분 정리
채권 ETF 이름만 보고 사면 당하는 5가지 함정 (ep08 채권 가이드)
thumbnail_texts: 금리 인하 D-6개월 / 채권 판이 바뀐다

image_concepts.A: 박대리(30대 남성 샐러리맨 대리) — 좌절한 표정으로 계좌 화면 응시, TLT -31% 빨간 그래프가 벽면을 가득 채움
image_concepts.B: Jerome Powell, Federal Reserve Chairman — FOMC 발표대에서 금리 인하 시그널, 배경 채권 수익률 곡선 스팁화 차트

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 A 실사. 박대리 30대 한국 샐러리맨 대리, 어두운 방 노트북 앞에서 손으로 머리를 감싸고 좌절한 표정. 뒷벽의 대형 모니터에 빨간 TLT 주가 폭락 차트와 숫자 '−31%' '-930만원' 표시. 책상엔 펼쳐진 채권 ETF 보고서.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic cinematic close-up of a Korean male salaryman in his mid-30s wearing a rumpled white dress shirt and loosened navy tie, sitting at a dim home-office desk late at night, both hands gripping his head in despair, eyes wide with shock staring at a glowing laptop screen. Behind him, a massive wall-mounted LED monitor displays a steeply plunging red TLT stock chart with bold numbers '−31%' and '-9,300,000 KRW' in crisp digital typography. Scattered across the desk are open bond ETF research reports and a coffee cup. Dramatic navy-blue and gold accent lighting from a single desk lamp, shallow depth of field, Korean financial thriller aesthetic. Shot on 50mm at f/1.8. The bottom 40% of the image transitions from the scene into pure solid black (#000000) through a smooth gradient fade. The gradient starts at the 60% line and becomes fully black by the 75% line. The remaining bottom 25% is completely solid black with no elements.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 B 실사. Jerome Powell, Federal Reserve Chairman가 FOMC 기자회견 발표대에서 엄숙한 표정으로 발언. 뒤 대형 스크린에 미국채 수익률 곡선 스팁화 그래프와 '2Y 3.5% / 10Y 4.0% / 30Y 4.5%' 숫자.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic cinematic medium shot of Jerome Powell, Federal Reserve Chairman, standing at the FOMC press conference podium in a dark suit, speaking with a serious measured expression and one hand gesturing deliberately. Behind him, a huge presentation screen displays a steepening US Treasury yield curve graph with clearly labeled markers '2Y 3.5%' '5Y 3.7%' '10Y 4.0%' '30Y 4.5%' in crisp digital typography. Federal Reserve seal partially visible on the wall. Cold blue-white professional lighting with gold accent highlights creating a navy-and-gold palette, central bank authority atmosphere. Shot on 85mm at f/2.8, ultra-sharp editorial realism, Reuters press photo style. The bottom 40% of the image transitions from the scene into pure solid black (#000000) through a smooth gradient fade. The gradient starts at the 60% line and becomes fully black by the 75% line. The remaining bottom 25% is completely solid black with no elements.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 와일드카드. 거대한 금속 시소 구조물 위에 왼쪽엔 'INTEREST RATE ↑', 오른쪽엔 'BOND PRICE ↓'가 저울처럼 오르내리는 장면. 아래 SHY·IEF·TLT 3개의 채권 ETF가 각기 다른 지렛대 길이로 고정되어 있음.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic cinematic wide shot of a massive industrial steel seesaw structure in a dramatic studio space. The left side is tilted sharply upward, bearing a glowing red sign 'INTEREST RATE ↑' with dynamic upward arrow particles. The right side is tilted sharply downward, bearing a blue sign 'BOND PRICE ↓'. Three stylized bond ETF boxes labeled 'SHY', 'IEF', and 'TLT' hang from the seesaw at progressively longer lever arms (SHY closest to fulcrum, TLT farthest), visually conveying duration sensitivity. A Korean businessman figure in a suit observes from the foreground, looking up in contemplation. Dramatic navy-blue and gold studio lighting with volumetric fog, high-contrast editorial infographic aesthetic. Shot on 35mm at f/4. The bottom 40% of the image transitions from the scene into pure solid black (#000000) through a smooth gradient fade. The gradient starts at the 60% line and becomes fully black by the 75% line. The remaining bottom 25% is completely solid black with no elements.
